ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA'S MOTION OR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOTION PAPERS FILED NOR WAS ANY MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED. WHILE THE BANK FILED A PROOF OF SERVICE OF ITS NOTICE OF SUBMISSION, NO OTHER PROOF OF SERVICE PERTINENT TO THIS MOTION WAS FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - TABATHA YASELL, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition was filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ru

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Plaintiff Bank of America's motion or judgment on the pleadings is off calendar. No proof of service of the motion papers filed nor was any memorandum of points and authorities filed. While the Bank filed a proof of service of its notice of submission, no other proof of service pertinent to this motion was filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)
